title: Bridge Essay: Perfectionism as a predictor of physician burnout.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Perfectionism, as, a, predictor, of.

**Perfectionism as apredictor of physician burnout.** — BMC Health Serv Res. PMID: 36443726. DOI: 10.1186/s12913-022-08785-7. Burnout is common among physicians and has detrimental effects on patient care and physician health. Recent editorials call attention to perfectionism in medicine; however, no studies to date have examined the effect of perfectionism on burnout in physicians practicing in the United States. This study examined associations among demographics, perfectionism and personality traits, and burnout among practicing physicians.
